{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603211804458E6A39AFF6E22C821B11\"}"},"total":4439},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7119346368422265633","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"熬夜看完了。故事进展节奏紧凑，文字简洁流畅，现场氛围感强。就喜欢这种干脆利落的写作风格。人物个性鲜明突出。缺点个人认为是情感戏份稍欠缺不够细腻。还有一点，就想问问作者，传承给男主的内力，从头到尾真就给浪费了还是作者给写忘了？"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1657602080,"group_id":"7091168434246913060","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N11/xWexCl133noChtzSE9ZoWi5PATVnwjdqoni5KLN6","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/77a1b8103ef24ad098d1bf759928b040~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776620454\u0026x-signature=VSzH1AxjA9UqhCHLYD%2F2CIX1Y2s%3D","user_id":"4388894874272111","user_name":"我毒"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4388894874272111","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7091168434246913060","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越成废太子，本想远离一切纷争，娶个媳妇，面朝大海，春暖花开，可虎狼环视，麻烦不断，既如此我为大凉执伞镇天下！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2badf84129a63b784490bd845bdc2afe","author":"黄河落日圆","author_id":"","book_id":"7091168434246913060","book_name":"穿越成了废太子","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":273,\"name\":\"历史古代\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273\u0026name=历史古代\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\
